description_long: This is a tall, yellow postbox with a polygonal top and a sturdy rectangular base, commonly found in German urban environments. The front face features a mail slot near the top, a rectangular collection times panel below it, and a prominent Deutsche Post logo. The side panels also display the Deutsche Post logo, with one side showing a sticker and some wear. The rear face is plain, lacking any openings or markings. The base is metallic and slightly raised, suggesting durability and weather resistance. The overall construction appears to be metal, designed to withstand outdoor conditions and frequent public use.
description: A tall, yellow metal postbox with a polygonal top, front mail slot, and Deutsche Post logos on the sides. It features a metallic base and a collection times panel on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow body, Deutsche Post logo, and a sticker near the top.
description_view_1: Front view with the mail slot, collection times panel, and Deutsche Post logo above the slot.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with another Deutsche Post logo and some surface wear.
description_view_3: Rear view, plain yellow with no openings or markings, and a metallic base.
attribute_mail_slot_location: centered on the upper front face
attribute_collection_times_panel: rectangular panel below the mail slot on the front face, displaying collection information
attribute_postal_service_logo: black Deutsche Post horn logo painted on both side panels and above the mail slot on the front
attribute_door_or_access_panel: large rectangular door on the front face below the collection times panel
attribute_posting_aperture_design: horizontal rectangular slot with a beveled edge
